data.content: Implementation review approved. Verified the configurable max concurrent sessions setting is added to the settings schema and Defaults UI, persisted through settings load/save/update paths, consumed by beats-page launch/queue slot calculations, and enforced by terminal-manager session creation. The prior stale-settings issue is addressed by invalidating the ['settings'] query after save. Reviewed test coverage for settings persistence/defaults; no acceptance-criteria regressions found.
